signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 162.42 — 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; Middle East tensions introduce intervention risk on a break above 160.00. JPY COT LF short −115,033 (crowded carry). Carry dominates until VIX > 25.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: EUR/USD COT LF net short −67,504 (long% 34.5%) vs HV30 at 4.6%, ATM IV at 7.1% — 1.2 vol-pt premium over realized. Positioning stalling — late-trend caution.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Options Skew
signals.text: AUD/USD 25d RR at −0.97 — moderate put skew signals options market biased for AUD weakness despite bullish COT positioning. AUD/USD at 0.689.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −23,314 vs RBNZ hike prob: 62% priced for 8 Jul. If RBNZ delivers or signals hike, short-squeeze risk is elevated — crowded spec short unwind targets 0.5900+. NZD/USD at 0.5661.

signals.title: GBP/USD — Real Rate Divergence
signals.text: GBP/USD real rate: +0.78% vs EUR: +0.08% — restrictive GBP stance supports strength bias. GBP/USD at 1.3226.
